title: BranchGeofence
description: READ-ONLY value-object shape describing the geofence configuration that lives on a `branches` row (owned by the future Facilities module). This module DEFINES the columns via a migration that extends `branches` (T1.1) but does NOT own the branches table itself.
x-value_object_note: Hydrated by BranchGeofenceRepository from the branches table. Never persisted to a dedicated table. This schema documents the columns we ADD to `branches` via T1.1 migration.

geofence_polygon.description: The branch's fence, drawn as a simple polygon (no holes on day 1).

geofence_radius_m.description: Radius in meters for radius-mode evaluation. Used only when geofence_polygon IS NULL.

geofence_accuracy_tolerance_m.description: Reject GPS readings noisier than this. Consumer sees SKIPPED.

geofence_enforcement_enabled.description: Consumer feature toggle — evaluator ignores this, consumers read it to decide whether to block on OUTSIDE.

geofence_updated_at.description: When the fence was last edited. Powers 'stale fence' surfacing.

geofencePolygon.description: Magellan Polygon. Wire shape: { type: 'Polygon', coordinates: [[[lng, lat], ...]], srid: 4326 }.
